pages.title: Low Lights Tokyo / 君がいないNight
pages.tagline: Dive into the neon-drenched heartbreak of Low Lights Tokyo.

pages.body: Step onto this rainy rooftop where trap rock drums collide with gritty electric guitars. The track navigates a bittersweet tension between partying to forget and the lingering pain of loss. Driving bass synths pulse beneath atmospheric synthesizers as emotive vocals alternate from rhythmic spoken verses to breathy, melodic choruses. It is a journey through urban isolation where every neon light turns blue in reflection of grief that refuses to fade away.
pages.styleSentence: A high-energy J-Rock fusion blending trap rock beats and hip-hop elements with cathartic pop sensibilities, featuring driving drums, gritty electric guitars, deep 808 bass synths, and atmospheric neon-lit synthesizers at a fast tempo of 136 BPM.

pages.text:
[Intro]
Yeah
Low lights Tokyo
君がいない night

[Verse 1]
ヴァイナル揺れて I slide through slow
同じパーティー but 帰れない home
808 鳴ってる 心の奥
君のボイス still stuck in my phone
笑ってるけど I’m not alright
青いライトで 踊ってる night
Everybody moving でも心は ice
人混みの中 探して your light

[Pre-Chorus]
もしドラムが fade out しても
ここにいてよ please don’t go
もしライトが消えても tonight
君だけは消えないで stay in my sight

[Chorus]
We’re in love with the party
but I’m still missing you
Low lights 染まる body
ネオンは turning blue
まだ帰りたくないね
but I can’t say goodbye
踊ってるふりのままで
I’m breaking in the night

[Verse 2]
スムーズなコード 雨のガラスみたい
終電過ぎても 消えない vibe
待たないでって 君は言ったけど
でもまだ君を探してるよ
クラウドの声は so loud tonight
同じ song でも痛い inside
心の中で party が鳴っても
君がいない night 感じる cold

[Bridge]
ドラム止まっても
まだ sway, sway
最後の音よ
どうか don’t fade away
鼓動重なって
また離れてく
部屋を出た君
まだ心にいる

[Final Chorus]
We’re in love with the party
but I’m still missing you
Low lights 染まる body
ネオンは turning blue
まだ帰りたくないね
but I can’t say goodbye
まだ party に恋して
ひとり Tokyo lights

[Outro]
Yeah
Low lights Tokyo
君がいない night

pages.vocalStyle: Emotive rap-singing delivery alternating between rhythmic spoken verses and melodic, breathy choruses with Japanese-English bilingual phrasing.

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Sets the tone with breathy, emotive delivery.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Harmonizes softly behind the main vocal lines.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Keeps the floor shaking. Never misses a downbeat.

members.name: PERCUSSION
members.bio: Layers crisp hits above the main drum kit.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Drops deep 808 frequencies to anchor the mix.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Paints atmospheric layers over the beat.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Adds subtle urban sounds and rain ambience.

members.name: GUITAR
members.bio: Weaves gritty riffs through the neon chaos.

levels.name: RAINY ANTICIPATION
levels.emotion: Atmospheric dread and anticipation of rain

levels.name: NEON RELEASE
levels.emotion: Raw emotional release amidst neon chaos

levels.name: VOID ACCEPTANCE
levels.emotion: Resigned acceptance of the void left behind

levels.name: ANTHEMIC RESIGNATION
levels.emotion: Anthemic resignation and final acceptance of loss
